title: Duplicate executions for a single webhook call
symptom: When a webhook is called, multiple executions are triggered for the same request, leading to duplicate processing.
not_this_if: Webhook is responding quickly without retries
root_cause: The issue arises when the sender retries the request due to a timeout, which can happen if the workflow takes too long to respond. This results in the same request being sent multiple times, causing duplicates.
fix_steps: Use the 'Respond to Webhook' node to send an immediate response
Implement idempotency checks in your workflow
Log request IDs to detect and handle duplicates
agent_instruction: Implement immediate response handling and idempotency checks in your webhook workflow.
